title: The Richest Woman in the World
original_title: La Femme la plus riche du monde
overview: An elderly billionaire woman gives hundreds of millions of euros to a younger gay artist she is close to. Her daughter files a complaint for abuse of a vulnerable person and a scandal erupts.
